title: Department Manager Vacancy at Khadim's - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Khadim's - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Khadim's! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Navi Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Khadim's:
Khadim's is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Khadim's!
